name: Spaghetti with Oil & Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and mince six garlic cloves. Set aside.
Slice the remaining garlic.
2. Heat oil in a small skillet. Add sliced garlic.
Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until golden brown.
3. Bring 4 quarts of water to boil. Stir in salt.
Add spaghetti and cook until firm yet tender. Do not overcook.
Drain, then transfer to a pot.
4. Add chicken stock to pasta and simmer until most broth is absorbed.
5. Stir in garlic and oil mixture, then minced garlic and parsley.
Toss thoroughly.
6. Divide pasta among heated plates. Pour remaining broth over pasta.
Serve immediately with grated cheese and freshly ground black pepper.
